pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.7.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses jakarta.* packages, causing compile errors if mixed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 11 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum runtime; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail or result in incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.inject dependency with jakarta.inject-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3); using javax.inject will cause ClassNotFoundException or compile errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to replace removed javax.mail functionality in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 removes javax.mail; code relying on JavaMail API will fail at runtime or compile time without the Jakarta equivalent.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact from mysql-connector-java to mysql-connector-j to match the new Maven coordinates required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifactId mysql-connector-java is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL driver versions managed by Spring Boot 3; using it may lead to resolution failures or version conflicts.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compile errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Migrate JPA import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in WebSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Compile error: antMatchers method does not exist on WebSecurity.IgnoringRequestCustomizer in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Compile error: antMatchers method does not exist on RequestMatcherConfigurer in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API to lambda DSL.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Compile error: The old fluent API methods (e.g., .and(), .rememberMe() without lambda) are removed or incompatible in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Add http.build() return statement to SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Compile error: Method must return a SecurityFilterChain instance.

src/main/resources/application-developme.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 2.x nested YAML property syntax to Spring Boot 3.x flat property syntax.
src/main/resources/application-developme.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (based on Spring Framework 6) enforces stricter YAML parsing and property binding; the nested 'resources' structure under 'spring' is no longer valid or recognized for WebMvcResourceProperties, leading to configuration being ignored or binding failures.

src/main/resources/application-developme.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 2.x nested YAML property syntax for static locations to Spring Boot 3.x flat property syntax.
src/main/resources/application-developme.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (based on Spring Framework 6) enforces stricter YAML parsing and property binding; the nested 'resources' structure under 'spring' is no longer valid or recognized for WebMvcResourceProperties, leading to configuration being ignored or binding failures.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 2 property 'spring.mvc.favicon.enabled' with a comment indicating removal, as favicon handling is managed differently in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: The property 'spring.mvc.favicon.enabled' is removed in Spring Boot 3; keeping it causes a binding error or is ignored, requiring explicit removal or replacement.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
# This property is deprecated and will be removed in future Spring Boot versions
  # enabled: false

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Replace nested 'jmx-enabled' property with flat 'tomcat.jmx-enabled' property for datasource configuration.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 changes how certain nested properties are bound; using the flat key ensures correct binding to the Tomcat DataSource pool configuration.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Move 'spring.resources.cache.period' from nested structure to flat property key.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 prefers flat property keys for resource caching configuration; the nested structure may not bind correctly.
The property 'server.use-forward-headers' is removed in Spring Boot 3; using it causes a binding error. It must be replaced with 'server.forward-headers-strategy'.
The property 'logging.file' is removed in Spring Boot 3; using it causes a binding error. It must be replaced with 'logging.file.name'.
